## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

List the commands, tests, or manual acceptance steps you ran.

## Checklist

- [ ] This pull request is focused on one problem.
- [ ] Tests or documentation were added or updated where needed.
- [ ] I removed confidential data, credentials, and unrelated changes.
- [ ] I added screenshots or a recording for visible UI changes, or marked this as not applicable.
- [ ] I reviewed [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
